billing.inactiveMessage:
Price-changing actions are currently unavailable.

Restore your subscription access to continue applying pricing changes, scheduling campaigns, and publishing updates.

You can continue browsing the app in read-only mode.
billing.verificationMessage:
We couldn't verify your subscription status.

This is usually temporary. Refresh the app and try again.
billing.bannerBodyInactive: Reactivate billing to continue using Price Polish without interruption.

toast.campaignTitleRequired: Campaign title is required before applying pricing.
toast.pricesLiveUpdated: Prices updated and live on storefront
toast.noConflictsDetected: No conflicts detected for this campaign.
toast.scheduleActivatePlan: Activate a plan to schedule pricing operations.
toast.scheduleNoProductsForScope: No products available for the selected scheduling scope.

rules.intro: Configure how prices change and how the final price is normalized before you apply, schedule, or run live storefront pricing.
rules.previewBanner: Current price is your Shopify baseline. Textbox previews show what your rules would set next.

hero.title: Welcome to Price Polish
hero.line3: Stay in control of promotions and scheduled pricing.
hero.why: Price Polish helps you manage pricing changes more efficiently, reduce repetitive manual work, and maintain better control over promotions.

safety.title: Your pricing stays protected
safety.subtitle: Designed to reduce risk and help you move forward with confidence.

social.title: Built for growing Shopify merchants
social.subtitle: Designed to simplify pricing operations and reduce manual effort.

createRule.title: Step 1: Create your first pricing rule
createRule.doneBody: Your pricing rule is set up. You can adjust it any time from the Rules page.
createRule.body: A pricing rule tells Price Polish how to calculate your prices. Start with a percentage markup or markdown, then choose how prices should end.
createRule.tip: Begin with a small percentage adjustment. You can preview results before applying anything to your store.

preview.title: Step 2: Preview your pricing
preview.doneBody: You've seen how your pricing rule applies to your products. Ready to apply it?
preview.body: Preview shows you exactly what prices will change to before you apply anything. Review the list and confirm the changes look right.

apply.title: Step 3: Apply your first pricing update
apply.doneBody: Your pricing update was applied. The history is recorded and can be reverted at any time.
apply.body: Apply your pricing to your store catalog. Every change is tracked and can be reverted, so you can move forward confidently.

success.title: Setup complete
success.body:
Your pricing update was applied successfully.

You're ready to run future pricing updates with confidence. Review your campaign history, schedule promotions, or adjust your pricing rules at any time.

onboarding.heroLine3: Stay in control of promotions and scheduled pricing.
onboarding.heroWhyThisMatters: Price Polish helps you manage pricing changes more efficiently, reduce repetitive manual work, and maintain better control over promotions.
onboarding.progressSubtitle: Complete these steps to run your first pricing update.
onboarding.safetySubtitle: Designed to reduce risk and help you move forward with confidence.
onboarding.socialProofSubtitle: Designed to simplify pricing operations and reduce manual effort.

celebration.title: First pricing update completed
celebration.body:
Your pricing changes were applied successfully.

You can now automate future promotions, schedule campaigns, and manage pricing changes with confidence.

nextSteps.title: You're ready for more
nextSteps.subtitle: Recommended next steps to keep pricing operations predictable and easy to manage.

review.title: Enjoying Price Polish?
review.body: Your feedback helps us improve the app and helps other merchants discover it.
